expected.title: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

text:
**Email sent.** Here's the confirmation:

- **To:** oncall@acme.io
- **Subject:** Top error
- **Body:** OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

This was the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count:
- **Issue ID:** SENTRY-3029
- **Event count:** 4,665

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'sentry_issues'"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"INSERT INTO emails (to_addr, subject, body)
SELECT 'oncall@acme.io', 'Top error', si.title
FROM sentry_issues si
WHERE si.status = 'unresolved'
ORDER BY si.count DESC
LIMIT 1"}

text: Let me confirm exactly what was sent:

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT si.id, si.title, si.count
FROM sentry_issues si
WHERE si.status = 'unresolved'
ORDER BY si.count DESC
LIMIT 1"}
